title: Utility
description: A Modpack Aimed To Improve The Gaming Experience
body:
# 🔧 Versions
- 1.0.0 - First Release - Main mods/features added
# ❓ What is Utility?
- Utility contains mods/shaders/texturepacks which makes the game look and feel better to play. Utility aimes to create the best experience for every player even if they are on poor performing hardware because of the performance mods.
# 📜 Main Features
- Sodium
- Xaero's Minimap
- Freecam
- Iris
# 🔧 Patches/Bug Fixes
- None to be made yet
